message:
Fix error states, abort controllers, unmount safety (#4992)

- SecurityIssues: show error state when isFailed instead of false green
  all-clear (#4965)
- PodIssues: show error state when isFailed instead of false "All pods
  healthy" (#4966)
- DeploymentIssues: show error state when isFailed instead of false
  "All healthy" (#4973)
- DataCompliance: track per-cluster fetch failures and display warning
  when clusters are unavailable (#4976)
- HardwareHealthCard: show error feedback when clearAlert fails instead
  of silently swallowing (#4977)
- GitHubActivity: add AbortController to fetchGitHubData with signal
  checks before every setState to prevent updates after unmount (#4979)
- OPAPolicies: add AbortController to agent clusters fetch with cleanup
  on unmount (#4980)
- CardComponents: add 'error' variant to CardEmptyState

Fixes #4965, #4966, #4973, #4976, #4977, #4979, #4980

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
